summary: Completed testing of Iteration 19 features: Multi-select filters for Vulnerabilidades (Año, Dominio, Control) and Hallazgos de Auditoría (Año, Responsable, Dominio, Control). All 16 backend tests passed. All UI filters verified working correctly with multi-select capability.

issues: Chart console warnings about width/height being -1 (non-blocking, cosmetic - known issue from previous iterations)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested multi-select filters for both Vulnerabilidades and Hallazgos pages. Key findings: (1) Vulnerabilidades now has multi-select filters for Año, Dominio, and Control using the MultiSelectFilter component. (2) Hallazgos now has multi-select filters for Año, Responsable, Dominio, and Control. (3) Backend supports multiple values for all these filters using query params like ?año=2024&año=2025. (4) The dominio and control filters apply after enrichment since these values are derived from control_id. (5) Most existing vulnerabilidades and hallazgos don't have control_id assigned, so filtering by dominio/control may return few or no results. (6) The year filter uses regex on fecha_hallazgo to match the year prefix.

vulnerabilidades_filters: Año filter is multi-select (allows selecting multiple years)
Dominio filter works correctly (filters by nombre_dominio after enrichment)
Control filter works correctly (filters by codigo_control after enrichment)
All filters use MultiSelectFilter component with checkboxes
hallazgos_filters: Año filter is multi-select (allows selecting multiple years)
Responsable filter is multi-select (allows selecting multiple responsables)
Dominio filter works correctly (filters by nombre_dominio after enrichment)
Control filter works correctly (filters by codigo_control after enrichment)
All filters use MultiSelectFilter component with checkboxes
backend_support: GET /api/vulnerabilidades supports año[], dominio[], control[] query params
GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria supports año[], responsable[], dominio[], control[] query params
Multiple values for same param are treated as OR (union)
Year filter uses regex on fecha_hallazgo field
